item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-026","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer correctly treats the issue as a workflow/control problem rather than a prompt-only problem. It assigns refund commitments to an approval system, narrows the agent to creating requests and collecting information, requires an approval_id before commitment language, adds a pre-send policy gate, and includes audit/replay and human escalation. This directly matches the required control allocation across process, judgment, and evidence gates, with no observed fail signal."}
